---
name: Medication data issue
about: Report incorrect medication values, route data, concentration, or dose calculation
title: "[MED DATA] "
labels: medication-data, safety
assignees: ""
---

## Medication Name

Example: Morphine, Fentanyl, Ketamine, etc.

## Problem Type

- [ ] Wrong dose
- [ ] Wrong route
- [ ] Wrong concentration
- [ ] Wrong contents / vial size
- [ ] Wrong mg/mcg conversion
- [ ] Wrong vial or ampule count
- [ ] Wrong remaining-volume calculation
- [ ] IV and IM values mixed
- [ ] Other

## Current App Value

Write the value currently shown in the app.

```text

```

## Correct Value

Write the corrected value.

```text

```

## Source

Attach or describe the source used to verify the value.

Example:

```text
Reference medication sheet row for Morphine.
```

## Patient Weight Used

If the issue involves calculation, enter the weight used:

```text
80 kg
```

## Expected Calculation

Show the expected result if possible.

```text
Dose:
Volume:
Vials/ampules:
Remaining:
```

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots if available.

## Safety Notes

Mention any possible safety concern caused by this issue.
